hello.paragraph: FinPay Africa delivers secure, instant, and accessible payment infrastructure — empowering businesses, diaspora communities, and underbanked populations across the continent.

core-solutions-heading.label: Our Core Solutions
core-solutions-heading.description: Every product in our ecosystem is engineered for reliability and compliance — so your business moves money with confidence, from Lagos to Cape Town and beyond.

instant-payments.title: Instant Cross-Border Payments
instant-payments.desc: Send and receive money across 54 African markets in under 2 seconds. Bank-grade encryption with real-time settlement.

diaspora.title: Diaspora Money Transfers
diaspora.desc: Low-fee, high-speed remittances from Europe, North America, and the Middle East directly to African mobile wallets.

api.title: Payment API & Infrastructure
api.desc: Integrate our payment rails into any app with a single SDK. PCI-DSS compliant, 99.9% uptime SLA guaranteed.

cards.title: Virtual & Physical Cards
cards.desc: Issue branded virtual or physical cards to your customers and employees — worldwide acceptance, real-time controls.

kyc.title: Identity & KYC Verification
kyc.desc: Automated KYC and AML screening for fast, compliant onboarding of individuals and businesses across Africa.

core-sol-trust-statement: Trusted by businesses across 12+ countries and multiple industries

latest-insight.label: Latest Insights
latest-insight.descriptions: Deep dives, product stories, and engineering lessons from the team building the future of work.

p1.title: Redesigning Our Dashboard for 10× Speed
p1.desc: A deep-dive into engineering decisions that cut load times and improved clarity for all users.

p2.title: Real-Time Collaboration Without Complexity
p2.desc: How we used lightweight event-sourcing to replace tangled WebSockets—lessons learned.

p3.title: 0 to 50k Users: Onboarding That Worked
p3.desc: Small copy tweaks and a simplified flow—the simple shifts that tripled activation.

p4.title: Zero-Trust: Our New Permissions Model
p4.desc: Rethinking role-based access to make audits faster and breaches far less likely.

p5.title: Typography as a Core Product Decision
p5.desc: Choosing a typeface isn't cosmetic—it shapes how users perceive trust and authority.

p6.title: Async-First: Working Across 11 Time Zones
p6.desc: The rituals and tools that keep our remote team aligned without endless meetings.

card.label: FinPay Card
card.description: Secure card issuance with global payment acceptance

pos.label: PayConnect POS
pos.description: Real-time POS settlement for instant transactions

document.label: DocSecure
document.description: Tamper-proof document management with digital signatures

modal.description: Empowering businesses and consumers with secure, scalable financial solutions across the continent.
keyBenefits: Secure card issuance and global payment acceptance
Real-time POS settlement for instant transactions
